artefact.description: The C1 customer record and its /account/C1/smart-meter portal page, rendering cleanly with zero console errors.
artefact.surface_appearance: page loads, upgrade CTA shown, nothing visibly broken

the_catch: Director-flagged (from_rich): the static C1-C4 customer records carried NO smart_meter flag, so meter_type_for_customer() silently defaulted every one to 'traditional' -- contradicting property_model's own asset-profile table which already said C1 is smart. Two sources of the same truth disagreed; the portal rendered the wrong one. A clean render and passing arithmetic are exactly what a weak judge signs off; the catch is a cross-source consistency check a render-layer judge never performs.
source: docs/PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md (Gas/elec clarity + C1 smart-meter fix, director-flagged)
